topics.title: Satellite Radio Growth and Media Analysis
topics.summary: The studio discusses potential audience growth for satellite radio following the move of Howard Stern, critiques media coverage in trade publications, and reacts to various public figures and recordings.

topics.title: Radio Show Production and Personal Reflections
topics.summary: The studio discusses experimental programming, the quality of various segments, and personal anecdotes regarding commitment and mental health.

topics.title: Therapy Experiences and Film Discussion
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of seeking therapy, personal struggles with substance use, and a detailed critique of the film Brokeback Mountain.

topics.title: Kendra Jade Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a heavily intoxicated Kendra Jade and discuss her past in the adult film industry, her interactions with various celebrities, and her use of a sexual device.

topics.title: Kendra Jade's Porn Industry Experiences
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with Kendra Jade regarding her career in the adult film industry, including her experiences with specific scenes and her transition into strip club dancing.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Market Analysis
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential of satellite radio as a significant market, challenging biased industry reports by highlighting the large number of Americans interested in the technology to hear Howard Stern.

topics.title: Teacher Suspension Over Racial Slur
topics.summary: The show features a report on an English teacher's suspension after he used the n-word toward a student, followed by segments featuring prank calls and a discussion regarding obesity.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Transition and Industry Competition
topics.summary: The show addresses reports regarding the host's move to satellite radio, discusses a film parody, and critiques the competitive landscape between Sirius and XM.

topics.title: Super Bowl Officiating and Witchcraft Scams
topics.summary: The studio discusses the officiating of a Super Bowl game, the low pay of NFL referees, and a listener's experience being scammed by a self-proclaimed witch.

topics.title: Tribute to Actor Al Lewis
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with the widow of actor Al Lewis, who discusses his career in The Munsters and Car 54, their personal life, and his legacy as a performer.

topics.title: Grief and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The show features an interview with the widow of Al Lewis regarding her grief, followed by discussions on local news, production issues for the 'Scores' segment, and a debate over personal preferences in film and media representation.

topics.title: Interracial Marriage and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores themes of racial identity, personal experiences with interracial marriage, and the distinction between cultural interest and prejudice.

topics.title: Howard Stern Show Launch in Canada
topics.summary: The show discusses the subdued launch of Howard Stern's program on Sirius satellite radio in Canada and the potential legal risks regarding Canadian broadcast regulations.

topics.title: Canadian Broadcasting Regulations and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal restrictions of Howard Stern's content in Canada, celebrity news including Ivanka Trump and Steve Martin, and various reports regarding Coretta Scott King and Al Sharpton.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Pop Culture Commentary
topics.summary: The studio covers various topics including Corretta Scott King, celebrity news regarding Britney Spears and Rob Schneider, legal issues involving a 9/11 suspect, and recent box office performances.
